name: Sleep Number Corporation
description: Sleep Number Corporation is an American manufacturer and retailer specializing in innovative sleep solutions, most notably its signature adjustable air-supported mattresses. Headquartered in Minneapolis, Minnesota, the company focuses on improving sleep health through technology, offering smart beds that allow users to adjust firmness and track sleep quality via the SleepIQ platform. In addition to its flagship mattresses, Sleep Number provides a range of bedding accessories, including pillows, sheets, and adjustable bases. The company operates through a direct-to-consumer model, selling its products through its own retail stores, online platform, and customer service channels.
